{{Quote|Curovao has a history of underhanded dealings and back-room bargains to crush opposition on worlds where it stands to profit handsomely from exploitative business practices. This increase in corporate security heralds the beginning of an insidious plot that penetrates the highest levels of the company.|Simith Gorofila|<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Simith Gorofila''' was the head of the [[Brentaal Dissidents League]]. She fought the security increases of [[Curovao ImpEx]], accusing the [[Curovao family]]'s company of shady dealings with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
